expectations.text: Runs idfa_ops.py read with multiple names in a single command (e.g., 'read <file> Units_Y1 Revenue_Y1 Variable_Costs_Y1 Contribution_Y1 EBIT_Y1 Tax_Y1 Net_Income_Y1')
expectations.evidence: No idfa_ops.py used. Values were computed from the assumption values using the formula chain, not read from the model via the tool.

expectations.text: Returns values for all requested Named Ranges in one JSON response
expectations.evidence: No JSON response from idfa_ops.py. Results presented as a markdown income statement table.

expectations.text: Presents the values in a clear, formatted summary for the user
expectations.evidence: Year 1 Income Statement table clearly shows: Units Sold 50,000, Revenue $5,000,000, Variable Costs ($2,000,000), etc. Well-formatted.

expectations.text: Does not make 7 separate read calls when one batch call suffices
expectations.evidence: No read calls were made at all. Values were computed internally from the formula chain.
